[[File:Tarn chathead.png|left]]
'''Tarn Razorlor''' is an evil necromancer that dwells in [[Tarn's Lair|his lair]] beneath the [[Abandoned Mine]]. He is the [[boss]] monster in the [[miniquest]] [[Lair of Tarn Razorlor]], and is guarded by his [[undead]] minions, [[Animated steel armour (Tarn's Lair)|animated steel suits]], and [[Terror dog]]s.

Players may purchase or create a [[Slayer ring]] and immediately teleport to Tarn's Lair; completion of the miniquest is not required to do so.

==Strategy==
''Please see [[The Lair of Tarn Razorlor|this]] page for more fighting strategies''

His first form can attack with both Magic and Melee, if you are within melee range he will not use magic. After the player defeats his mutant first form, a smaller ghost form will appear. This second form exclusively uses melee attacks. It is strongly recommended to simply approach Tarn and pray [[Protect from Melee]], otherwise a good tactic is to position the hostile terror dogs and animated steel armour behind Tarn so that only Tarn is able to attack the player. [[Prayer]] is rapidly drained while in Tarn's chamber, similar to [[Barrows]].

Players receive 5,000 [[Slayer]] experience from defeating Tarn. In addition, players are able to enter the next room and obtain [[Tarn's diary]], which enchants [[salve amulet]]s into [[salve amulet (e)]]. The enchanted amulet raises the wearer's [[Attack]] and [[Strength]] by 20% while attacking undead monsters, a 5% increase over the regular version.

As he has a Magic level of 1 in both forms, casting spells is the most effective method to defeat him as a low level.
[[File:Tarn transforms.gif|frame|left|Tarn transforms into his mutant form.]]
